name: Marcus Williams

career_goals.industry_preference: pulp-and-paper or renewable energy, wants to stay in Maine

background.family_background: Grew up in Millinocket, ME. Father worked at former Great Northern Paper mill. Spent 4 years as electrician before returning to school. Has partner and one child.

perspective: Every minute in class that does not connect to a real industrial system feels wasted. Values hands-on, practical work above all. Distrustful of 'AI tools' because past employers used automation to eliminate jobs.
